items.title: Turns Out The Irishman Detained By ICE Was Facing Drug Charges Back Home
items.description: The arrest of Irishman Seamus Culleton fueled a false media narrative that ICE is grabbing law-abiding people who have done nothing wrong.

items.title: Here Are 10 Great Justice Scalia Quotes To Mark A Decade Since His Passing
items.description: Here are some of Justice Scalia's best moments in remembrance of the 10-year anniversary of his passing.

items.title: Mamdami Demands U.S. Immigration Policy Start Obeying Islam
items.description: Mamdani invoked Islamic doctrine to define civic obligation and delegitimize lawful, constitutional authority.

items.title: Gen Z Is ‘Dumber’ Thanks To Adults Saturating Their Lives With Screens
items.description: Children can't be expected to dig deeper in an educational system engineered to keep them skimming.

items.title: Republicans Will Keep Losing Until They Realize Power Isn’t Evil
items.description: We can exercise power, or we can allow our enemies to exercise it. Choose wisely.
